data.body:
## Description

Add tests for design question integration and .claude/design-notes.md generation.

### Tests to write:
- test_design_questions_conditional: Assert SKILL.md mentions conditional activation for UI projects
- test_design_areas_complete: Assert SKILL.md references design areas (vision, archetypes, golden paths, visual language, accessibility)
- test_design_notes_output: Assert SKILL.md references .claude/design-notes.md as output
- test_design_skip_non_ui: Assert SKILL.md mentions skipping design questions for CLI/library/infrastructure projects

### .test-index RED marker
Update onboarding entry with RED marker: [test_design_questions_conditional]

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] At least 4 new design test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_design_' tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[test_design' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
